name: shopping_journey

observed_strengths.observation: Perfect 5.0/5 friction score — no blockers, 3 clicks to checkout, fastest journey across all 4 tested stores
Trust badges confirmed at checkout (trust_badges_at_checkout: true) — payment security signals present at highest-anxiety step
Afterpay available — BNPL option expands purchasing access for higher-priced bundles and subscription sign-ups among budget-conscious buyers

missing_or_weak.observation: Cart upsell not triggered (cart_upsell_present: false) despite 'Featured collection' H2 in cart structure — recommendations did not populate during the empty-cart journey
No urgency signal in cart (urgency_elements_present: false) — no free shipping threshold bar or countdown despite having an active promotional calendar (Father's Day sale, giveaway)

purchase_path_notes: Best-in-class journey: 5.0/5, trust badges, 3 clicks, 9 payment methods including BNPL. The cart upsell not populating is the only missed AOV opportunity in an otherwise excellent purchase flow.
